data.body: AC REFINEMENT (from research): the fix MUST use process-group reaping (Popen start_new_session + os.killpg TERM->KILL + stdin=DEVNULL), NOT a bare subprocess.run(timeout=) which is defeated by grandchildren on the pipe. And the timeout-driven RETRY must be write-safe: do not re-issue a create/link after a timeout without a check-before-create/existing-link dedup (Jira is non-idempotent). Bound both per-call and total wall-clock (deadline budget) with exponential backoff + jitter.
